meta.title: Eré ọ̀rọ̀ ojoojúmọ́
meta.description: Fojú inú wo ọ̀rọ̀ tí a fi pamọ́ ní ìgbìyànjú 6 (tàbí kéréje). Àdánwò tuntun lójoojúmọ́!
meta.keywords: Yorùbá, àdánwò, ọ̀rọ̀, eré, online, fojú inú wo, ojoojúmọ́

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Yoruba. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Yoruba as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Yoruba. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Yoruba. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Yoruba. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Yoruba. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Yoruba. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Yoruba. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: O kò tíì gbìyànjú ọ̀rọ̀ kankan!
text.share_challenge_win: I got today's Wordle in {n}. Can you beat me?
text.share_challenge_lose: I didn't get today's Wordle. Can you?
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} must be in position {position}

help.title: Bí a ṣe ń ṣeré
help.text_1_2: Gbogbo ìgbìyànjú gbọ́dọ̀ jẹ́ ọ̀rọ̀ lẹ́tà márùn-ún tí ó tọ́. Tẹ bọ́tìnnì enter láti fi ránṣẹ́.
help.text_1_3: Lẹ́yìn ìgbìyànjú, àwọn tile yóò yí àwọ̀ padà láti fi hàn lẹ́tà wo ló tọ́.
help.text_2_1: wà nínú ọ̀rọ̀ náà tí ó sì wà ní ipò tí ó tọ́!
help.text_2_2: wà nínú ọ̀rọ̀ náà, ṣùgbọ́n kì í ṣe ní ipò tí ó tọ́.
help.text_2_3: kò sí nínú ọ̀rọ̀ tí o ń gbìyànjú láti fojú inú rí.
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Ìtumọ̀ àti àwòrán AI lẹ́yìn eré
ui.install_app_desc: Ṣeré láìsí íńtánẹ́ẹ̀tì àti gba àmì app
ui.play_more_languages: Ṣeré ní èdè púpọ̀ láti rí àkótán àgbáyé rẹ!
ui.no_games_yet: O kò tíì ṣeré rárá. Yan èdè kan láti bẹ̀rẹ̀!
ui.easy_desc: A gba ọ̀rọ̀ èyíkéyìí, bí kò tilẹ̀ wà nínú ìwé-ìtumọ̀
ui.normal_desc: Ìgbìyànjú gbọ́dọ̀ jẹ́ ọ̀rọ̀ tó tọ́ láti inú ìwé-ìtumọ̀
ui.hard_desc: Àwọn ìtọ́ka tí a ṣí gbọ́dọ̀ wà nínú ìgbìyànjú tó kàn
ui.high_contrast_desc: Àwọ̀ tó dára fún àwọn tí kò rí àwọ̀ dáadáa
ui.future_word: A kò tíì ṣeré ọ̀rọ̀ yìí. Padà wá lẹ́yìn!
ui.daily_words_counting: ọ̀rọ̀ ojoojúmọ́ tí ó ń pọ̀ sí i
ui.difficulty_locked: Kò lè yí ìṣòro padà lẹ́yìn ìgbìyànjú
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: languages and counting — more added regularly.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — and more coming soon.
